CONTENT.Club career: On 30 October 2020, Kabić made his first team debut, replacing Aranđel Stojković in 73rd minute in 3:1 home win against Bačka.On 1 February 2024, Kabić moved to Torino in Italian Serie A on loan with an option to buy.
CONTENT.External links: Uroš Kabić at SoccerwayUroš Kabić at WorldFootball.net
CONTENT.International career: Kabić was called in Serbia U16 national team squad during the 2019, and played two friendly games against Slovakia U16. After that, he was member of a national U17 team, and debut against Bulgaria U17.

SUMMARY: Uroš Kabić  (Serbian Cyrillic: Урош Кабић; born 1 January 2004) is a Serbian professional footballer who plays as a winger for Serbian club Čukarički on loan from Red Star Belgrade.
